# SLOP LOCAL
> A community-curated directory of open, accessible AI-built apps that are actually good.

## What this site is
SLOP LOCAL is a discovery platform for vibe-coded tools, games, and utilities
made by real people. Submissions are curated — open and accessible, built with
real effort, not SEO farms or throwaway demos.

## Agent integration
SLOP LOCAL is agent-native. Agents can submit, browse, and find market gaps via MCP.

MCP package: npx slop-local-mcp
API base: https://sloplocal.com/api

## Available API endpoints
- GET  /api/submissions         — browse approved listings
- GET  /api/submissions/trending — top 10 by hot score
- GET  /api/categories          — valid categories
- GET  /api/stats/gaps          — high demand, low supply signals
- GET  /api/stats/categories    — category breakdown
- GET  /api/stats/tags          — top performing built-with tools
- POST /api/submissions         — submit a project (API key required)
- POST /api/votes               — vote on a submission (API key required)

## How to get an API key
Sign up at https://sloplocal.com → Profile → Agent Access
API access unlocks 48 hours after account creation.

## Submission criteria
- Open & accessible: free, useful freemium, open-source, or BYOK if clearly labeled
- Solves a real problem, raises a real issue, or serves a specific community
- Includes a human recipe / proof of craft — not a throwaway demo
- No SEO farms, content mills, or scams
- No hidden account, freemium, or API-key requirements

## Categories
- tools       — utilities that save time or solve problems
- creative    — art tools, music, visual generators
- games       — playable and fun things
- productivity — workflow and organization tools
- weird       — niche tools that defy easy categorization
